import json

files = {
    '/home/claude/claudecodeui/src/i18n/locales/ja/settings.json': 'MCP モニター',
    '/home/claude/claudecodeui/src/i18n/locales/en/settings.json': 'MCP Monitor',

")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio, os, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('TAVILY_API_KEY', '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'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('NOTION_API_KEY', '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'\)

from langchain_mcp_adapters.client import MultiServerMCPClient

async def test_server\(name, config\):
    try:
        client = MultiServerMCPClient\({name: config}\)
        tools = await asyncio.wait_for\(client.get_tools\(\), timeout=15\)
        print\(f'✅ {name}: {len\(tools\)} tools'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'❌ {name}: {type\(e\).__name__}: {str\(e\)[:100]}'\)

async def main\(\):
    servers = {
        'playwright': {'command': 'npx', 'args': ['-y', '@playwright/mcp'], 'transport': 'stdio'},
        'filesystem': {'command': 'npx', 'args': ['-y', '@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem', './'], 'transport': 'stdio'},
        'git':        {'command': 'npx', 'args': ['-y', '@modelcontextprotocol/server-git', '/home/claude'], 'transport': 'stdio'},
        'tavily':     {'command': 'npx', 'args': ['-y', 'tavily-mcp'], 'transport': 'stdio', 'env': {'TAVILY_API_KEY': os.environ['TAVILY_API_KEY']}},
    }
    for name, cfg in servers.items\(\):
        await test_server\(name, cfg\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json

MM_URL = 'http://192.168.11.234:8065'
ADMIN_TOKEN = 'bi6our7i5ffhiqof8qbupg9gqh'

bots = [
    {'username': 'uketuke-bot', 'email': 'uketuke@bushidan.local', 'password': 'Bushidan2026!', 'first_name': '受付'},
    {'username': 'gaiji-bot',   'email': 'gaiji@bushidan.local',   'password': 'Bushidan2026!', 'first_name': '外事'},
    {'username': 'yuhitsu-bot', 'email': 'yuhitsu@bushidan.local', 'password': 'Bushidan2026!', 'first_name': '右筆'},
]

ids = {}
for b in bots:
    req = urllib.request.Request\(
        f'{MM_URL}/api/v4/users',
        data=json.dumps\(b\).encode\(\),
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {ADMIN_TOKEN}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        method='POST'
    \)
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r:
            d = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
            ids[b['username']] = d['id']
            print\(f'{b[\\"username\\"]}: {d[\\"id\\"]}'\)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        err = json.loads\(e.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'{b[\\"username\\"]}: SKIP \({err.get\(\\"id\\",\\"?\\"\)}\)'\)

import urllib.request, json

MM_URL = 'http://192.168.11.234:8065'
ADMIN_TOKEN = 'bi6our7i5ffhiqof8qbupg9gqh'
TEAM_ID = 'qiqtgmx9qpgi5kjumwa3gmejmr'

# seppou-bot 作成
req = urllib.request.Request\(
    f'{MM_URL}/api/v4/users',
    data=json.dumps\({'email': 'seppou@bushidan.local', 'username': 'seppou-bot', 'password': 'Bushidan2026!', 'first_name': '斥候'}\).encode\(\),
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {ADMIN_TOKEN}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r:
        d = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)
        uid = d['id']
        print\('seppou-bot id:', uid\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    err = json.loads\(e.read\(\)\)
    print\('create err:', err.get\('id'\)\)
    req2 = urllib.request.Request\(f'{MM_URL}/api/v4/users/username/seppou-bot',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {ADMIN_TOKEN}'}\)
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req2\) as r:
        uid = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)['id']
    print\('seppou-bot existing id:', uid\)

# チーム追加
req = urllib.request.Request\(
    f'{MM_URL}/api/v4/teams/{TEAM_ID}/members',
    data=json.dumps\({'team_id': TEAM_ID, 'user_id': uid}\).encode\(\),
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {ADMIN_TOKEN}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
\)
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r: print\('team: OK'\)
except: print\('team: already member'\)

# トークン作成
req = urllib.request.Request\(
    f'{MM_URL}/api/v4/users/{uid}/tokens',
    data=json.dumps\({'description': 'seppou-bot token'}\).encode\(\),
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {ADMIN_TOKEN}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
\)
with urllib.request.urlopen\(req\) as r:
    tok = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)['token']
    print\(f'seppou-bot token: {tok}'\)
    print\(f'seppou-bot user_id: {uid}'\)
EOF)

]

        print\(f'  ✅ {f}'\)
        ok += 1

print\(f'\\n{ok}/{len\(files\)} ファイル OK'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
from mistralai.client import Mistral
from mistralai.models import ChatMessage
import os

api_key = os.getenv\("MISTRAL_API_KEY"\)
client = Mistral\(api_key=api_key\)

try:
    # Try using complete
    response = client.chat.complete\(
        model="mistral-large-latest",
        messages=[ChatMessage\(role="user", content="test"\)],
        max_tokens=1,
    \)
    print\(f"✅ Success: {response.model if hasattr\(response, 'model'\) else 'mistral-large'}"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"❌ Error: {e}"\)
EOF)
